TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Bill_Allen, title = Bill_Allen, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bill_Allen} }

S.FORM: Bill Allen bulad demiad, 1945 a mihca, Bill Allen, miunduay.
S.PHON: bir~ɾr~ɾ ar~ɾr~ɾən bur~ɾad dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, bir~ɾr~ɾ ar~ɾr~ɾən, miunduaj.
